name: [GRIDHAND] SMS Campaign Agent - Trigger: appointment tomorrow → reminder SMS + confirm link

gridhand.scenario: Trigger: appointment tomorrow → reminder SMS + confirm link
gridhand.description: When an appointment is scheduled for the next day in your calendar app, such as Google Calendar, GRIDHAND's automation workflow kicks in, triggering a reminder SMS to be sent to the client at 8am the morning before the appointment, including a personalized confirm link to reduce no-shows. This automated SMS, sent via Twilio, not only reminds the client of their upcoming appointment but also allows them to easily confirm or reschedule, saving your business time and revenue by minimizing last-minute cancellations. By streamlining appointment reminders and confirmations, your small business can improve customer satisfaction and reduce missed appointments, resulting in increased revenue and a more efficient scheduling process.
